anomalies.note: Exceeds 20% threshold. Likely cold-cache effect in fresh venv (simulation_mode). Still well within 1ms SLO.
Exceeds 20% threshold. Cold-cache effect. Still within 1ms SLO.
Dominant operation. Exceeds 20% threshold but below 2x baseline (0.374ms). Within 2ms SLO.
100%+ delta but absolute values (0.004ms → 0.009ms) are negligible. SLO headroom: 99.1% remaining.

next_cycle_inputs.description: Perf baseline methodology inconsistency: pre-deploy baseline uses warm-cache environment while post-deploy simulation uses cold-cache fresh venv. Add warmup iterations (10–20 runs discarded) to both pre and post measurements for valid comparison.
Replace absolute delta % anomaly detection with SLO-headroom-relative detection (% of SLO consumed rather than % change from baseline) to prevent false positives on sub-millisecond operations.
Add docs/audit/ SAST and PR review reports to trial projects so next_cycle_inputs can pull deferred items from upstream audit stage.
